revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Category see also if exists 2/doc]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Category see also if exists 2/doc]] <nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>

revision.comment: Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High use|72611}} Displays a "see also" link to a category, ''if it exists''. Otherwise, it will optionally display a "see also" link to a second category, ''if that exists''. Similarly with the third and fourth parameters. If none of the categories exists, it does nothing. Note that {{tl|category redirect}}s are resolved. == Purpose == This template is a variant of {{Tl|Category see also if exists}}, with added provision for a fallback category if the first one does not exist. It allows the creation of a link to a category which may not yet exist, but which will be displayed if and when the category is created. This is useful as a category tree is being developed, because the editor does not have guess whether the target category is likely to exist any time soon. The link can be created now, rather than having to edit the page again later. This template can be used in other templates such as {{tl|estcat}}, or directly on category pages or articles. ==Usage== ;Usual syntax : '''{{tlx|Category see also if exists 2|category name|second category name}}''' '''Parameters:''' # category name # optional second (fallback) category name. If the first category does not exist, the second will be tested in the same way, and linked only if it exists. ;Examples # A category which does exist:
{{Category see also if exists 2|1915 disestablishments in South West Africa}} → {{Category see also if exists 2|1915 disestablishments in South West Africa}} # A non-existent Category:
{{Category see also if exists 2|1919 disestablishments in South West Africa}} → {{Category see also if exists 2|1919 disestablishments in South West Africa}} # A non-existent category with a fallback category that does exist:
{{Category see also if exists 2|1919 disestablishments in South West Africa|1910s disestablishments in South West Africa}} → {{Category see also if exists 2|1919 disestablishments in South West Africa|1910s disestablishments in South West Africa}} # A non-existent category with a fallback category that also does not exist:
{{Category see also if exists 2|1955 disestablishments in South West Africa|1950s disestablishments in South West Africa}} → {{Category see also if exists 2|1955 disestablishments in South West Africa|1950s disestablishments in South West Africa}} The outcomes of the above examples 1, 3 and 4 are displayed at [[:Category:1915 establishments in South West Africa]], [[:Category:1919 establishments in South West Africa]] and [[:Category:1955 establishments in South West Africa]]. ;Extended syntax : '''{{tlx|Category see also if exists 2|category name|second category name|third category name|fourth category name}}''' The optional third and fourth parameters are tested in turn to see if they exist if neither the first nor second parameters exist. ==Redirects== *{{tl|Cat see also if exists 2}} ==See also== *{{tl|Category see also if exists}} *{{tl|Category see also}} *{{tl|Link if exists}} *{{tl|Category series navigation}} – for navigation between categories with years, decades, ordinals, or seasons in their name *{{tl|if empty}} {{Category hatnote templates}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Conditional link templates]] [[:en:Category:Hatnote templates for category pages|Category:Hatnote templates for category pages]] [[Category:Internal category-link templates|See also]] [[Category:Interwiki category linking templates|See also]] [[Category:Wikipedia see also]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High use|72611}} Displays a "see also" link to a category, ''if it exists''. Otherwise, it will optionally display a "see also" link to a second category, ''if that exists''. Similarly with the third and fourth parameters. If none of the categories exists, it does nothing. Note that {{tl|category redirect}}s are resolved. == Purpose == This template is a variant of {{Tl|Category see also if exists}}, with added provision for a fallback category if the first one does not exist. It allows the creation of a link to a category which may not yet exist, but which will be displayed if and when the category is created. This is useful as a category tree is being developed, because the editor does not have guess whether the target category is likely to exist any time soon. The link can be created now, rather than having to edit the page again later. This template can be used in other templates such as {{tl|estcat}}, or directly on category pages or articles. ==Usage== ;Usual syntax : '''{{tlx|Category see also if exists 2|category name|second category name}}''' '''Parameters:''' # category name # optional second (fallback) category name. If the first category does not exist, the second will be tested in the same way, and linked only if it exists. ;Examples # A category which does exist:
{{Category see also if exists 2|1915 disestablishments in South West Africa}} → {{Category see also if exists 2|1915 disestablishments in South West Africa}} # A non-existent Category:
{{Category see also if exists 2|1919 disestablishments in South West Africa}} → {{Category see also if exists 2|1919 disestablishments in South West Africa}} # A non-existent category with a fallback category that does exist:
{{Category see also if exists 2|1919 disestablishments in South West Africa|1910s disestablishments in South West Africa}} → {{Category see also if exists 2|1919 disestablishments in South West Africa|1910s disestablishments in South West Africa}} # A non-existent category with a fallback category that also does not exist:
{{Category see also if exists 2|1955 disestablishments in South West Africa|1950s disestablishments in South West Africa}} → {{Category see also if exists 2|1955 disestablishments in South West Africa|1950s disestablishments in South West Africa}} The outcomes of the above examples 1, 3 and 4 are displayed at [[:Category:1915 establishments in South West Africa]], [[:Category:1919 establishments in South West Africa]] and [[:Category:1955 establishments in South West Africa]]. ;Extended syntax : '''{{tlx|Category see also if exists 2|category name|second category name|third category name|fourth category name}}''' The optional third and fourth parameters are tested in turn to see if they exist if neither the first nor second parameters exist. ==Redirects== *{{tl|Cat see also if exists 2}} ==See also== *{{tl|Category see also if exists}} *{{tl|Category see also}} *{{tl|Link if exists}} *{{tl|Category series navigation}} – for navigation between categories with years, decades, ordinals, or seasons in their name *{{tl|if empty}} {{Category hatnote templates}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Conditional link templates]] [[:en:Category:Hatnote templates for category pages|Category:Hatnote templates for category pages]] [[Category:Internal category-link templates|See also]] [[Category:Interwiki category linking templates|See also]] [[Category:Wikipedia see also]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High use|72611}} Displays a "see also" link to a category, ''if it exists''. Otherwise, it will optionally display a "see also" link to a second category, ''if that exists''. Similarly with the third and fourth parameters. If none of the categories exists, it does nothing. Note that {{tl|category redirect}}s are resolved. == Purpose == This template is a variant of {{Tl|Category see also if exists}}, with added provision for a fallback category if the first one does not exist. It allows the creation of a link to a category which may not yet exist, but which will be displayed if and when the category is created. This is useful as a category tree is being developed, because the editor does not have guess whether the target category is likely to exist any time soon. The link can be created now, rather than having to edit the page again later. This template can be used in other templates such as {{tl|estcat}}, or directly on category pages or articles. ==Usage== ;Usual syntax : '''{{tlx|Category see also if exists 2|category name|second category name}}''' '''Parameters:''' # category name # optional second (fallback) category name. If the first category does not exist, the second will be tested in the same way, and linked only if it exists. ;Examples # A category which does exist:
{{Category see also if exists 2|1915 disestablishments in South West Africa}} → {{Category see also if exists 2|1915 disestablishments in South West Africa}} # A non-existent Category:
{{Category see also if exists 2|1919 disestablishments in South West Africa}} → {{Category see also if exists 2|1919 disestablishments in South West Africa}} # A non-existent category with a fallback category that does exist:
{{Category see also if exists 2|1919 disestablishments in South West Africa|1910s disestablishments in South West Africa}} → {{Category see also if exists 2|1919 disestablishments in South West Africa|1910s disestablishments in South West Africa}} # A non-existent category with a fallback category that also does not exist:
{{Category see also if exists 2|1955 disestablishments in South West Africa|1950s disestablishments in South West Africa}} → {{Category see also if exists 2|1955 disestablishments in South West Africa|1950s disestablishments in South West Africa}} The outcomes of the above examples 1, 3 and 4 are displayed at [[:Category:1915 establishments in South West Africa]], [[:Category:1919 establishments in South West Africa]] and [[:Category:1955 establishments in South West Africa]]. ;Extended syntax : '''{{tlx|Category see also if exists 2|category name|second category name|third category name|fourth category name}}''' The optional third and fourth parameters are tested in turn to see if they exist if neither the first nor second parameters exist. ==Redirects== *{{tl|Cat see also if exists 2}} ==See also== *{{tl|Category see also if exists}} *{{tl|Category see also}} *{{tl|Link if exists}} *{{tl|Category series navigation}} – for navigation between categories with years, decades, ordinals, or seasons in their name *{{tl|if empty}} {{Category hatnote templates}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Conditional link templates]] [[:en:Category:Hatnote templates for category pages|Category:Hatnote templates for category pages]] [[Category:Internal category-link templates|See also]] [[Category:Interwiki category linking templates|See also]] [[Category:Wikipedia see also]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High use|72611}} Displays a "see also" link to a category, ''if it exists''. Otherwise, it will optionally display a "see also" link to a second category, ''if that exists''. Similarly with the third and fourth parameters. If none of the categories exists, it does nothing. Note that {{tl|category redirect}}s are resolved. == Purpose == This template is a variant of {{Tl|Category see also if exists}}, with added provision for a fallback category if the first one does not exist. It allows the creation of a link to a category which may not yet exist, but which will be displayed if and when the category is created. This is useful as a category tree is being developed, because the editor does not have guess whether the target category is likely to exist any time soon. The link can be created now, rather than having to edit the page again later. This template can be used in other templates such as {{tl|estcat}}, or directly on category pages or articles. ==Usage== ;Usual syntax : '''{{tlx|Category see also if exists 2|category name|second category name}}''' '''Parameters:''' # category name # optional second (fallback) category name. If the first category does not exist, the second will be tested in the same way, and linked only if it exists. ;Examples # A category which does exist:
{{Category see also if exists 2|1915 disestablishments in South West Africa}} → {{Category see also if exists 2|1915 disestablishments in South West Africa}} # A non-existent Category:
{{Category see also if exists 2|1919 disestablishments in South West Africa}} → {{Category see also if exists 2|1919 disestablishments in South West Africa}} # A non-existent category with a fallback category that does exist:
{{Category see also if exists 2|1919 disestablishments in South West Africa|1910s disestablishments in South West Africa}} → {{Category see also if exists 2|1919 disestablishments in South West Africa|1910s disestablishments in South West Africa}} # A non-existent category with a fallback category that also does not exist:
{{Category see also if exists 2|1955 disestablishments in South West Africa|1950s disestablishments in South West Africa}} → {{Category see also if exists 2|1955 disestablishments in South West Africa|1950s disestablishments in South West Africa}} The outcomes of the above examples 1, 3 and 4 are displayed at [[:Category:1915 establishments in South West Africa]], [[:Category:1919 establishments in South West Africa]] and [[:Category:1955 establishments in South West Africa]]. ;Extended syntax : '''{{tlx|Category see also if exists 2|category name|second category name|third category name|fourth category name}}''' The optional third and fourth parameters are tested in turn to see if they exist if neither the first nor second parameters exist. ==Redirects== *{{tl|Cat see also if exists 2}} ==See also== *{{tl|Category see also if exists}} *{{tl|Category see also}} *{{tl|Link if exists}} *{{tl|Category series navigation}} – for navigation between categories with years, decades, ordinals, or seasons in their name *{{tl|if empty}} {{Category hatnote templates}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Conditional link templates]] [[:en:Category:Hatnote templates for category pages|Category:Hatnote templates for category pages]] [[Category:Internal category-link templates|See also]] [[Category:Interwiki category linking templates|See also]] [[Category:Wikipedia see also]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High use|72611}} Displays a "see also" link to a category, ''if it exists''. Otherwise, it will optionally display a "see also" link to a second category, ''if that exists''. Similarly with the third and fourth parameters. If none of the categories exists, it does nothing. Note that {{tl|category redirect}}s are resolved. == Purpose == This template is a variant of {{Tl|Category see also if exists}}, with added provision for a fallback category if the first one does not exist. It allows the creation of a link to a category which may not yet exist, but which will be displayed if and when the category is created. This is useful as a category tree is being developed, because the editor does not have guess whether the target category is likely to exist any time soon. The link can be created now, rather than having to edit the page again later. This template can be used in other templates such as {{tl|estcat}}, or directly on category pages or articles. ==Usage== ;Usual syntax : '''{{tlx|Category see also if exists 2|category name|second category name}}''' '''Parameters:''' # category name # optional second (fallback) category name. If the first category does not exist, the second will be tested in the same way, and linked only if it exists. ;Examples # A category which does exist:
{{Category see also if exists 2|1915 disestablishments in South West Africa}} → {{Category see also if exists 2|1915 disestablishments in South West Africa}} # A non-existent Category:
{{Category see also if exists 2|1919 disestablishments in South West Africa}} → {{Category see also if exists 2|1919 disestablishments in South West Africa}} # A non-existent category with a fallback category that does exist:
{{Category see also if exists 2|1919 disestablishments in South West Africa|1910s disestablishments in South West Africa}} → {{Category see also if exists 2|1919 disestablishments in South West Africa|1910s disestablishments in South West Africa}} # A non-existent category with a fallback category that also does not exist:
{{Category see also if exists 2|1955 disestablishments in South West Africa|1950s disestablishments in South West Africa}} → {{Category see also if exists 2|1955 disestablishments in South West Africa|1950s disestablishments in South West Africa}} The outcomes of the above examples 1, 3 and 4 are displayed at [[:Category:1915 establishments in South West Africa]], [[:Category:1919 establishments in South West Africa]] and [[:Category:1955 establishments in South West Africa]]. ;Extended syntax : '''{{tlx|Category see also if exists 2|category name|second category name|third category name|fourth category name}}''' The optional third and fourth parameters are tested in turn to see if they exist if neither the first nor second parameters exist. ==Redirects== *{{tl|Cat see also if exists 2}} ==See also== *{{tl|Category see also if exists}} *{{tl|Category see also}} *{{tl|Link if exists}} *{{tl|Category series navigation}} – for navigation between categories with years, decades, ordinals, or seasons in their name *{{tl|if empty}} {{Category hatnote templates}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Conditional link templates]] [[:en:Category:Hatnote templates for category pages|Category:Hatnote templates for category pages]] [[Category:Internal category-link templates|See also]] [[Category:Interwiki category linking templates|See also]] [[Category:Wikipedia see also]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High use|72611}} Displays a "see also" link to a category, ''if it exists''. Otherwise, it will optionally display a "see also" link to a second category, ''if that exists''. Similarly with the third and fourth parameters. If none of the categories exists, it does nothing. Note that {{tl|category redirect}}s are resolved. == Purpose == This template is a variant of {{Tl|Category see also if exists}}, with added provision for a fallback category if the first one does not exist. It allows the creation of a link to a category which may not yet exist, but which will be displayed if and when the category is created. This is useful as a category tree is being developed, because the editor does not have guess whether the target category is likely to exist any time soon. The link can be created now, rather than having to edit the page again later. This template can be used in other templates such as {{tl|estcat}}, or directly on category pages or articles. ==Usage== ;Usual syntax : '''{{tlx|Category see also if exists 2|category name|second category name}}''' '''Parameters:''' # category name # optional second (fallback) category name. If the first category does not exist, the second will be tested in the same way, and linked only if it exists. ;Examples # A category which does exist:
{{Category see also if exists 2|1915 disestablishments in South West Africa}} → {{Category see also if exists 2|1915 disestablishments in South West Africa}} # A non-existent Category:
{{Category see also if exists 2|1919 disestablishments in South West Africa}} → {{Category see also if exists 2|1919 disestablishments in South West Africa}} # A non-existent category with a fallback category that does exist:
{{Category see also if exists 2|1919 disestablishments in South West Africa|1910s disestablishments in South West Africa}} → {{Category see also if exists 2|1919 disestablishments in South West Africa|1910s disestablishments in South West Africa}} # A non-existent category with a fallback category that also does not exist:
{{Category see also if exists 2|1955 disestablishments in South West Africa|1950s disestablishments in South West Africa}} → {{Category see also if exists 2|1955 disestablishments in South West Africa|1950s disestablishments in South West Africa}} The outcomes of the above examples 1, 3 and 4 are displayed at [[:Category:1915 establishments in South West Africa]], [[:Category:1919 establishments in South West Africa]] and [[:Category:1955 establishments in South West Africa]]. ;Extended syntax : '''{{tlx|Category see also if exists 2|category name|second category name|third category name|fourth category name}}''' The optional third and fourth parameters are tested in turn to see if they exist if neither the first nor second parameters exist. ==Redirects== *{{tl|Cat see also if exists 2}} ==See also== *{{tl|Category see also if exists}} *{{tl|Category see also}} *{{tl|Link if exists}} *{{tl|Category series navigation}} – for navigation between categories with years, decades, ordinals, or seasons in their name *{{tl|if empty}} {{Category hatnote templates}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Conditional link templates]] [[:en:Category:Hatnote templates for category pages|Category:Hatnote templates for category pages]] [[Category:Internal category-link templates|See also]] [[Category:Interwiki category linking templates|See also]] [[Category:Wikipedia see also]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 5 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23128882600|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High use|72611}} Displays a "see also" link to a category, ''if it exists''. Otherwise, it will optionally display a "see also" link to a second category, ''if that exists''. Similarly with the third and fourth parameters. If none of the categories exists, it does nothing. Note that {{tl|category redirect}}s are resolved. == Purpose == This template is a variant of {{Tl|Category see also if exists}}, with added provision for a fallback category if the first one does not exist. It allows the creation of a link to a category which may not yet exist, but which will be displayed if and when the category is created. This is useful as a category tree is being developed, because the editor does not have guess whether the target category is likely to exist any time soon. The link can be created now, rather than having to edit the page again later. This template can be used in other templates such as {{tl|estcat}}, or directly on category pages or articles. ==Usage== ;Usual syntax : '''{{tlx|Category see also if exists 2|category name|second category name}}''' '''Parameters:''' # category name # optional second (fallback) category name. If the first category does not exist, the second will be tested in the same way, and linked only if it exists. ;Examples # A category which does exist:
{{Category see also if exists 2|1915 disestablishments in South West Africa}} → {{Category see also if exists 2|1915 disestablishments in South West Africa}} # A non-existent Category:
{{Category see also if exists 2|1919 disestablishments in South West Africa}} → {{Category see also if exists 2|1919 disestablishments in South West Africa}} # A non-existent category with a fallback category that does exist:
{{Category see also if exists 2|1919 disestablishments in South West Africa|1910s disestablishments in South West Africa}} → {{Category see also if exists 2|1919 disestablishments in South West Africa|1910s disestablishments in South West Africa}} # A non-existent category with a fallback category that also does not exist:
{{Category see also if exists 2|1955 disestablishments in South West Africa|1950s disestablishments in South West Africa}} → {{Category see also if exists 2|1955 disestablishments in South West Africa|1950s disestablishments in South West Africa}} The outcomes of the above examples 1, 3 and 4 are displayed at [[:Category:1915 establishments in South West Africa]], [[:Category:1919 establishments in South West Africa]] and [[:Category:1955 establishments in South West Africa]]. ;Extended syntax : '''{{tlx|Category see also if exists 2|category name|second category name|third category name|fourth category name}}''' The optional third and fourth parameters are tested in turn to see if they exist if neither the first nor second parameters exist. ==Redirects== *{{tl|Cat see also if exists 2}} ==See also== *{{tl|Category see also if exists}} *{{tl|Category see also}} *{{tl|Link if exists}} *{{tl|Category series navigation}} – for navigation between categories with years, decades, ordinals, or seasons in their name *{{tl|if empty}} {{Category hatnote templates}} {{sandbox other|| [[:en:Category:Hatnote templates for category pages|Category:Hatnote templates for category pages]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Conditional link templates]] [[Category:Internal category-link templates|See also]] [[Category:Interwiki category linking templates|See also]] [[Category:Wikipedia see also]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

{{Documentation subpage}} {{High use|72611}} Displays a "see also" link to a category, ''if it exists''. Otherwise, it will optionally display a "see also" link to a second category, ''if that exists''. Similarly with the third and fourth parameters. If none of the categories exists, it does nothing. Note that {{tl|category redirect}}s are resolved. == Purpose == This template is a variant of {{Tl|Category see also if exists}}, with added provision for a fallback category if the first one does not exist. It allows the creation of a link to a category which may not yet exist, but which will be displayed if and when the category is created. This is useful as a category tree is being developed, because the editor does not have guess whether the target category is likely to exist any time soon. The link can be created now, rather than having to edit the page again later. This template can be used in other templates such as {{tl|estcat}}, or directly on category pages or articles. ==Usage== ;Usual syntax : '''{{tlx|Category see also if exists 2|category name|second category name}}''' '''Parameters:''' # category name # optional second (fallback) category name. If the first category does not exist, the second will be tested in the same way, and linked only if it exists. ;Examples # A category which does exist:
{{Category see also if exists 2|1915 disestablishments in South West Africa}} → {{Category see also if exists 2|1915 disestablishments in South West Africa}} # A non-existent Category:
{{Category see also if exists 2|1919 disestablishments in South West Africa}} → {{Category see also if exists 2|1919 disestablishments in South West Africa}} # A non-existent category with a fallback category that does exist:
{{Category see also if exists 2|1919 disestablishments in South West Africa|1910s disestablishments in South West Africa}} → {{Category see also if exists 2|1919 disestablishments in South West Africa|1910s disestablishments in South West Africa}} # A non-existent category with a fallback category that also does not exist:
{{Category see also if exists 2|1955 disestablishments in South West Africa|1950s disestablishments in South West Africa}} → {{Category see also if exists 2|1955 disestablishments in South West Africa|1950s disestablishments in South West Africa}} The outcomes of the above examples 1, 3 and 4 are displayed at [[:Category:1915 establishments in South West Africa]], [[:Category:1919 establishments in South West Africa]] and [[:Category:1955 establishments in South West Africa]]. ;Extended syntax : '''{{tlx|Category see also if exists 2|category name|second category name|third category name|fourth category name}}''' The optional third and fourth parameters are tested in turn to see if they exist if neither the first nor second parameters exist. ==Redirects== *{{tl|Cat see also if exists 2}} ==See also== *{{tl|Category see also if exists}} *{{tl|Category see also}} *{{tl|Link if exists}} *{{tl|Category series navigation}} – for navigation between categories with years, decades, ordinals, or seasons in their name *{{tl|if empty}} {{Category hatnote templates}} {{sandbox other|| [[:en:Category:Hatnote templates for category pages|Category:Hatnote templates for category pages]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Conditional link templates]] [[Category:Internal category-link templates|See also]] [[Category:Interwiki category linking templates|See also]] [[Category:Wikipedia see also]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Category_see_also_if_exists_2%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High use|72611}} Displays a "see also" link to a category, ''if it exists''. Otherwise, it will optionally display a "see also" link to a second category, ''if that exists''. Similarly with the third and fourth parameters. If none of the categories exists, it does nothing. Note that {{tl|category redirect}}s are resolved. == Purpose == This template is a variant of {{Tl|Category see also if exists}}, with added provision for a fallback category if the first one does not exist. It allows the creation of a link to a category which may not yet exist, but which will be displayed if and when the category is created. This is useful as a category tree is being developed, because the editor does not have guess whether the target category is likely to exist any time soon. The link can be created now, rather than having to edit the page again later. This template can be used in other templates such as {{tl|estcat}}, or directly on category pages or articles. ==Usage== ;Usual syntax : '''{{tlx|Category see also if exists 2|category name|second category name}}''' '''Parameters:''' # category name # optional second (fallback) category name. If the first category does not exist, the second will be tested in the same way, and linked only if it exists. ;Examples # A category which does exist:
{{Category see also if exists 2|1915 disestablishments in South West Africa}} → {{Category see also if exists 2|1915 disestablishments in South West Africa}} # A non-existent Category:
{{Category see also if exists 2|1919 disestablishments in South West Africa}} → {{Category see also if exists 2|1919 disestablishments in South West Africa}} # A non-existent category with a fallback category that does exist:
{{Category see also if exists 2|1919 disestablishments in South West Africa|1910s disestablishments in South West Africa}} → {{Category see also if exists 2|1919 disestablishments in South West Africa|1910s disestablishments in South West Africa}} # A non-existent category with a fallback category that also does not exist:
{{Category see also if exists 2|1955 disestablishments in South West Africa|1950s disestablishments in South West Africa}} → {{Category see also if exists 2|1955 disestablishments in South West Africa|1950s disestablishments in South West Africa}} The outcomes of the above examples 1, 3 and 4 are displayed at [[:Category:1915 establishments in South West Africa]], [[:Category:1919 establishments in South West Africa]] and [[:Category:1955 establishments in South West Africa]]. ;Extended syntax : '''{{tlx|Category see also if exists 2|category name|second category name|third category name|fourth category name}}''' The optional third and fourth parameters are tested in turn to see if they exist if neither the first nor second parameters exist. ==Redirects== *{{tl|Cat see also if exists 2}} ==See also== *{{tl|Category see also if exists}} *{{tl|Category see also}} *{{tl|Link if exists}} *{{tl|Category series navigation}} – for navigation between categories with years, decades, ordinals, or seasons in their name *{{tl|if empty}} {{Category hatnote templates}} {{sandbox other|| [[:en:Category:Hatnote templates for category pages|Category:Hatnote templates for category pages]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Conditional link templates]] [[Category:Internal category-link templates|See also]] [[Category:Interwiki category linking templates|See also]] [[Category:Wikipedia see also]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
